info.name: DHL Freight Shipment Booking - SANDBOX - 2026/R03
info.description:
Name: JSON Collection of DHL Freight Shipment Booking API

Target: DHL API Developer Portal SANDBOX

Classification: For Public Use if the customer has valid business contract with DHL Freight

Published: March 2026

Support: [api4freight@dhl.com](https://mailto:api4freight@dhl.com) (Your DHL Freight API Farm Team)

Note: After strict tests on SANDBOX, cURL should be changed to PRODUCTION by the Customer

body.raw:
